response.reasoning: The candidate demonstrates 20 years of software engineering experience, significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly addresses AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development—a core requirement. Strong track record in TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple Senior/Staff positions. Full-stack capability confirmed through Optilyz (AWS CDK, React, MongoDB) and RIDE Capital roles. Architecture experience evident from multiple Staff titles and infrastructure work (Docker, Kubernetes, microservices at Dunnhumby). Primary stack alignment is strong: TypeScript ✓, Node.js ✓, React ✓; Java ✓ (Altom); Nest.js not explicitly mentioned but extensive Node.js expertise covers application framework capability. Key gap: testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not listed in skills section, though TDD mindset evident from workshops and 'testable projects' focus. Database experience includes MongoDB ✓, MySQL ✓ but PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned. Overall: exceeds seniority and breadth requirements; AI-agent match is strong; minor skill documentation gaps don't offset substantial capability evidence.
strengths: Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—exact alignment with stated requirement
Demonstrates mastery of primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) across multiple senior roles with proven ability to architect at scale
20 years of continuous full-stack and systems engineering; multiple Staff titles show consistent recognition of architectural capability
concerns: Vitest and Jest not explicitly listed in skills section despite being required; reliance on inferring testing expertise from TDD workshops and architecture experience
Nest.js framework not mentioned; while Node.js experience is extensive, lack of explicit framework reference raises onboarding cost question
PostgreSQL and relational database expertise not listed; only MongoDB and SQL/MySQL mentioned—may require ramp-up on PostgreSQL-specific patterns

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent infrastructure role at re:cinq

response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit for this Senior Fullstack role. He brings 20 years of engineering experience with demonstrated mastery of the primary technology stack and a current focus on AI-agent infrastructure—a stated requirement. Multiple Staff and Senior roles confirm architectural capability and ability to design end-to-end systems. The main documentation gaps (Vitest, Nest.js, PostgreSQL) are minor given the breadth and depth of full-stack and systems work; these are likely tools he can adopt quickly. His open-source contributions, workshop creation, and TDD-forward mindset align well with the role's focus on code quality and process improvement.
